Functions
fza_audio_fnc_audioHandler
Description
1

caution

2

warning

3

ase search

4

ase aquire

5

ase track

6

ase launch

7

ase power

Parameters
_heli: object

the apache the player is in

Returns

No returns

Examples

private _funcHook = _heli getVariable ["fza_audio_funcHook", scriptNull]; if (scriptDone _funcHook) then { _funcHook = [_heli] spawn fza_audio_fnc_audioHandler; _heli setVariable ["fza_audio_funcHook", _funcHook]; };

Author

Snow(Dryden)
